title: The Unofficial Rats Modpack
description: A pre-optimised way to play the Rats mod!
body:
Have you wanted to play Rats, but don't know how? Do you like NeoForge, but hate managing mods? With The Unofficial Rats Modpack, you can play this excellent (and somewhat unsettling) mod smoothly and easily!

This modpack is based off of the brilliant modpack [Hammer](https://modrinth.com/modpack/hammer). If you like (Neo)Forge, but want an optimised experience, check it out!

Also includes [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei).
